name: Artichoke Penne
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 tsp fresh oregano or 1/2 tsp dried oregano
salt and fresh ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Blanch artichokes in lightly salted water for 1 minute; let them defrost overnight in the fridge, then drain well.
2. Slice about 2/3 of the thawed artichokes into small wedges and set aside. Finely chop the remaining artichokes into a paste and set aside.
3. Cook penne or rigatoni until al dente in a large pot of boiling water.
4. In a separate pan, saute onion and garlic in 1/4 cup water until the water evaporates and onions are limp.
5. Add oregano, salt, and pepper to the pan.
6. Reduce heat to low, stir in white wine, lemon juice, and the reserved artichoke wedges and paste. Simmer, stirring occasionally, until heated through, about 1 minute.
7. Add ricotta cheese and stir until creamy.
8. When pasta is ready, drain it and add to the pan with the sauce. Toss well.
9. Remove from heat and stir in lemon zest. Taste and adjust seasonings.
10. Serve immediately.
